changes: Extended `evals/semi_real_probes/manifest.json` with a document-level `overlay_patch` withholding probe and confirmed that `stamp_shadow` does not create a regression worth keeping in the current seed/case.

Strengthened withholding parser priors so `residency_country_code` is forced back to `US` when the normalized country is confidently `United States of America`, even if the crop reads `ST` or another adjacent token fragment.
Added the taxonomy root cause `country_code_context_bleed` so invalid country-code crops that absorb nearby country text can be auto-classified from review_queue evidence.
Recorded the measured `overlay_patch` field-group delta in `evals/augmentation_effects/ledger.json`.

kept: overlay-patch parser prior for country-code context bleed
document-level `overlay_patch` probe as a tracked semi-real regression case
discarded: stamp-shadow probe as a current-priority candidate because the selected real-sample probe still passed before any code changes
treating the overlay-patch case as fully solved while `TIN` remains semantically wrong despite review pass

next_priorities: Add a probe that specifically stresses `middle_name` or `applicant_name` under occlusion, since current overlay/crop probes mostly expose address/country-code behavior.
Backfill at least one reviewed non-eval withholding front-side sample so region recognizer candidates can move beyond the current zero-val-sample blocker.
